description.value:
Frontier World

Frontier worlds lie on the lawless margins of the Imperium where settlers, scavengers, missionaries, raiders, and worse all struggle to survive with little support from the wider Imperium. Life there breeds stubborn self-reliance, technical improvisation, and a hard eye for threats creeping out of the dark. A frontier native who survives long enough to join an Inquisitorial warband is already used to making do without mercy, protection, or certainty.

Homeworld Bonus

+Ballistic Skill, +Perception, -Fellowship

Homeworld Aptitude

Ballistic Skill

Wounds

7+1d5

Fate Threshold

3 (Emperor's Blessing 7+)

Homeworld Trait

Rely on None but Yourself: A frontier world character gains a +20 bonus to Tech-Use tests when applying personal weapon modifications, and a +10 bonus when repairing damaged items.

specialAbilities.name: Rely on None but Yourself
specialAbilities.description: A frontier world character gains a +20 bonus to Tech-Use tests when applying personal weapon modifications, and a +10 bonus when repairing damaged items.

system.notes: Emperor's Blessing: On a roll of 7+ on 1d10, the character begins with an extra Fate Point.
